subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-08 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Verily, multitudes of men are encompassed by tribulation. The light of faith doth not shine forth that it might become the cause of patience and forbearance. When the heart of man is assured through faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیلی مردم در مخمصه هستند.  نور ایمان هم که نیست تا سبب صبر و تحمل شود.  انسان وقتی که قلبش مطمئن به ایمان است
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @light and darkness
